race.comment: Small field but looks a host of chances. Centres around VALLEY STAR and BUZZOFFSKI though who went to the line locked together last time. VALLEY STAR (1) tracked the favourite on debut and kept coming but just missed. Meets the winner better at the weights and will be winding up strongly again. BUZZOFFSKI (2) started a hot favourite on the back of a sharp trial win and after drawing the rails kicked strongly enough to scramble in. Meets the winner slightly worse for the narrow win but has upside and change of rider. Expected to go close again. ALL INTRIQUE (5) made debut earlier in the year in stakes class then was runner-up only other run before a break. Sure to be improved and can return with a big run. TOO POETIC (8) showed ability with a placing on debut then was well held in stakes class. Another who will return bigger and better. SHE'S GOT SWING (7) is a filly by Harry Angel on debut. Showed good ability in a trial win and can measure up.
